text: Being here, in front of the R+D wall, I feel a sense of curiosity and possibility. The vibrant colors and organized displays evoke the energy of innovation and inquiry. I am aware of the overlapping layers of technology, art, and thought, prompting reflection on the way research and development shape human experience. The bright lights and clean lines imbue the space with an optimistic, future-facing atmosphere. I feel quietly excited, eager to learn and to connect with the ideas presented.
